title: [Evermore Hotel, Bar]
description: On both sides of an archway leading to the foyer, ornate sconces hang between paintings on emerald-papered walls above dark-stained wainscoting.  A line of padded stools covered in cognac-hued leather welcome patrons to a long ebony bar fitted with a brass kickplate in front.  Reflected in a wall-length mirror positioned behind the well-stocked bar, groupings of oversized leather chairs around low tables offer more intimate conversation.

wayto.32113: ;e table = "Whiskey"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
